Thank you for your interest in instituting good governance practice in Meralco
If you are aware of any violation of the following corporate governance rules, committed by any our directors, officers or employees, related to the following:
Violation of the Corporate Governance Rules
Violation of the Code of Ethics and Company Code of Employee Discipline or other similar codes
Financial Malfeasance including those relating to financial fraud and questionable accounting and auditing matters
Kindly fill out the appropriate forms (click to download) and submit to any of the CG communication channels
Meralco values your privacy.
We collect your name, address, employee number, job title/position, company/office, contact number, email address, and signature solely to facilitate action on the Violation of Corporate Governance Rules and/or Retaliation Protection report you have submitted. These are accessed by Corporate Governance Office who hold such information under strict confidentiality. These are retained while any of the involved parties is employed in Meralco and shall be disposed of accordingly thereafter.
To know more about how we protect your data, visit
Privacy
. To exercise your data subject rights, contact
cdpo@meralco.com.ph
eReport Mo Form
Anti-Retaliation Form
Maintenance Schedule
June 28, 2026 - Batangas Province (Sto. Tomas City)
Batangas
BETWEEN 9:00AM AND 9:15AM AND THEN BETWEEN 4:45PM AND 5:00PM – PORTION OF CIRCUIT FPIP 416WW
First Philippine Industrial Park (FPIP) – Administration Building inside First Philippine Industrial Park (FPIP), Bgy. Sta. Anastacia.
REASON:
Installation and retirement of facilities in First Philippine Industrial Park (FPIP), Bgy. Sta. Anastacia, Sto. Tomas City, Batangas Province.

Maintenance Schedule
June 26, 2026 - Bulacan (Meycauayan City); And Caloocan City (Bagumbong)
Bulacan
BETWEEN 10:00AM AND 3:00PM – PORTION OF CIRCUIT MEYCAUAYAN 46YM
Portion of Mt. Samat Road and Bagbaguin Road from Sunluck Plastic Enterprises to and including Balete, Hulo and Pacheco Sts. in Bgy. Bagbaguin, Meycauayan City, Bulacan; Benedicto Compound, Clamor Compound, Clamor HOA Compound, Gary’s Ville Subd., Greenhouse Ville Subd., Horizon Ville Subd., Masaganda Subd., Nakasamba Subd., NMT HOA Inc. Subd., Recomville 5 Subd. and Villa Teresita Alisasis Subd.; and Bagumbong Dulo Road in Bagumbong, Caloocan City.
REASON:
Line reconductoring works, and installation and relocation of facilities along Mt. Samat Road and Bagbaguin Road in Bgy. Bagbaguin, Meycauayan City, Bulacan.
